# config

```go
import "im/internal/config"
```

Package config loads and validates im configuration.

<a name="DefaultConfigPath"></a>
## func DefaultConfigPath

```go
func DefaultConfigPath() string
```

DefaultConfigPath returns the standard config file location.

<a name="Config"></a>
## type Config

Config holds all im configuration.

```go
type Config struct {
    LogDir            string            `toml:"log_dir"`
    Editor            string            `toml:"editor"`
    EditorTimestamp   EditorTimestamp   `toml:"editor_timestamp"`
    TimestampRounding TimestampRounding `toml:"timestamp_rounding"`
}
```

<a name="DefaultConfig"></a>
### func DefaultConfig

```go
func DefaultConfig() Config
```

DefaultConfig returns a Config with sensible defaults.

<a name="Load"></a>
### func Load

```go
func Load(path string) (Config, error)
```

Load reads configuration from path, falling back to defaults for missing keys. If the file does not exist, defaults are returned with no error.

<a name="Config.ResolvedEditor"></a>
### func \(Config\) ResolvedEditor

```go
func (c Config) ResolvedEditor() string
```

ResolvedEditor returns the editor command: config value, then $EDITOR, then $VISUAL. Returns empty string if none are set.

<a name="Config.ResolvedLogDir"></a>
### func \(Config\) ResolvedLogDir

```go
func (c Config) ResolvedLogDir() (string, error)
```

ResolvedLogDir returns LogDir with \~ expanded to the user's home directory.

<a name="EditorTimestamp"></a>
## type EditorTimestamp

EditorTimestamp controls which moment is recorded for editor\-composed entries.

```go
type EditorTimestamp string
```

<a name="EditorTimestampStart"></a>EditorTimestamp values.

```go
const (
    EditorTimestampStart EditorTimestamp = "start"
    EditorTimestampEnd   EditorTimestamp = "end"
)
```

<a name="TimestampRounding"></a>
## type TimestampRounding

TimestampRounding controls how entry timestamps are rounded.

```go
type TimestampRounding string
```

<a name="TimestampRoundingAdaptive"></a>TimestampRounding values.

```go
const (
    TimestampRoundingAdaptive TimestampRounding = "adaptive"
    TimestampRoundingRound10  TimestampRounding = "round10"
)
```
